CVE-2022-36369.title: Improper access control in some QATzip software maintained by Int ...
CVE-2022-36369.description: Improper access control in some QATzip software maintained by Intel(R) before version 1.0.9 may allow an authenticated user to potentially enable escalation of privilege via local access.
